_comment: ThunderBridge config — Zhipu GLM (Anthropic-compatible gateway at open.bigmodel.cn, passthrough auth).
_prereq: ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN must be set to your Zhipu GLM API key (in ~/.claude/settings.json env block).

proxy._listen_port: 0 = OS picks a free port dynamically. Worktree-safe (matches astockos/maas/deepseek).
proxy._anthropic_upstream: Zhipu GLM Anthropic-compatible gateway (bigmodel.cn /api/anthropic). Same shape as DeepSeek/MaaS: native Anthropic protocol, no openai_compat translation. All traffic forwards here unless a route overrides.
proxy._max_tokens_floor: GLM-5.2 supports 1M context + large output; 64000 matches the UltraCode envelope floor.
proxy._include_stock_models: false = only advertise models from the 'models' list below, not stock Claude (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku). There is no Anthropic key here, so stock Claude would be a dead picker entry.
proxy._learn_stock_models: false = never auto-discover upstream's real Claude model list (GLM's gateway exposes GLM ids, not Claude ids).
proxy._pool: ── Connection pool (reuse upstream HTTPS connections, ~69ms → ~1ms TLS overhead per request) ──
proxy._pool_max_idle: Maximum idle connections kept open per upstream host (default 5). Increase for bursty Workflow workloads.
proxy._pool_max_total: Hard cap on concurrent connections to a single upstream host (default 10). Requests beyond this create ephemeral connections.
proxy._pool_idle_timeout: Seconds before an idle connection is closed by the background reaper (default 60).
proxy._circuit: ── Circuit breaker (fast-fail when upstream is down, instead of blocking 600s × 128 threads) ──
proxy._circuit_threshold: Number of consecutive upstream connection failures before the breaker opens (default 5).
proxy._circuit_recovery: Seconds to wait after OPEN before probing with one half-open request (default 30).
proxy._observability: ── Logging & stats (set UC_REQUEST_LOG / UC_STATS_INTERVAL env vars to override) ──
proxy._request_log: true = emit one structured REQ line per proxied request (key=value format). Set false in high-throughput production.
proxy._stats_interval: Seconds between STATS summary lines (uptime, req count, error rate, rps, KB, active conns). 0 disables.

routes._routes_note: Verified 2026-07-01 via `claude -p` direct to bigmodel.cn: Claude Code STRIPS the [1m] suffix from ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL before sending (settings.json has glm-5.2[1m], but Claude Code emits bare glm-5.2 on the wire → 200). So the route that actually fires for Claude Code traffic is 'glm-5.2' (and 'claude-glm-5-2' if picked in /model). The 'glm-5.2[1m]' key is DEFENSIVE — it only matters for a raw client that sends the suffixed id verbatim (curl does; GLM returns HTTP 400 code 1211 'model does not exist' without this remap). All three route to the same upstream+model. Upstream 'model' is always the BARE 'glm-5.2' — GLM's /api/anthropic gateway rejects the [1m] suffix; [1m] is a Claude-Code-side 1M-context label, not a valid upstream model code.

claude-glm-5-2._comment: TB /model picker id. Forward as bare glm-5.2.

glm-5.2[1m]._comment: Defensive: a raw client (curl, or a future Claude Code that stops stripping) sends glm-5.2[1m] verbatim → GLM 400 without remap. Today's Claude Code strips first, so this key rarely fires. Maps to bare glm-5.2.

glm-5.2._comment: Primary: the id Claude Code actually sends (after stripping [1m]). Forward as-is.

_migration: 2026-07-01: added GLM profile, corresponding to the ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL switch to https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/anthropic in ~/.claude/settings.json (direct claude already talks to GLM; this profile lets thunderbridge do the same through its UltraCode proxy envelope). Prior AStockOS default (config.astockos.json) stays on Tencent Cloud MAAS DeepSeek — non-destructive; activate GLM with `thunderbridge --profile glm` or `cp config.glm.json config.astockos.json` to make it the default.
